hero.title: [HI] Your Ride, Minutes Away

comfort.desc: [HI] Sit back and relax in clean, comfortable vehicles. Professional drivers handle navigation, traffic, and parking for you.

transparent.title: [HI] Transparent Pricing
transparent.desc: [HI] No surge pricing surprises. See upfront fares before booking. Pay securely in cash or through the app.

verified.title: [HI] Safe & Secure Rides
verified.desc: [HI] Background-verified drivers, real-time GPS tracking, and 24/7 customer support for your complete safety and peace of mind.

hourly.desc: [HI] Book a taxi by the hour for shopping, errands, or multiple stops throughout the day with flexible packages.

chauffeur.desc: [HI] Premium taxi service with professional chauffeurs for business meetings, events, and VIP transportation needs.

corporate.desc: [HI] Corporate taxi solutions for employee transportation, business travel, and fleet management with dedicated support.

faq.title: [HI] Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: [HI] Everything you need to know about RydCare taxi service
faq.q1: [HI] How quickly can I get a ride?
faq.a1: [HI] RydCare taxis typically arrive within 5-10 minutes in major cities. You can also schedule rides in advance for guaranteed pickup at your preferred time.
faq.q2: [HI] Are your drivers verified and safe?
faq.a2: [HI] Yes. All RydCare drivers undergo thorough background verification, license checks, and safety training. We maintain strict safety standards for your peace of mind.
faq.a3: [HI] Fares are calculated based on distance traveled, trip duration, and ride type selected. You'll see the estimated fare upfront before booking. No hidden charges or unexpected surge pricing.
faq.q4: [HI] Can I book a taxi for multiple days or outstation trips?
faq.a4: [HI] Absolutely! We offer multi-day packages for outstation trips, weekend getaways, and extended travel. Choose our Outstation service or contact support for custom packages.
faq.q5: [HI] What if I need to cancel my ride?
faq.a5: [HI] You can cancel rides through the app anytime. Free cancellation is available up to 5 minutes after booking. Minimal cancellation fees may apply for last-minute cancellations.
faq.q6: [HI] Which cities does RydCare operate in?
faq.a6: [HI] RydCare currently operates in 25+ major cities across India including Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, and more. Check the app for availability in your area. We're expanding rapidly!

footer.tagline: [HI] Reliable taxi service at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere.
footer.newsletter_text: [HI] Subscribe to get updates and special offers.
